text.title: Agent Trajectory Eval Method Decision Tree

root-question.text: Are trajectory logs (per-tool call + args + return) available for the agent under test?

question.text: Is a frozen golden trajectory set with ≥30 entries ready?
Is judge_calibration_date ≤90 days OR scoring is rule-based?

branch.conclusion: Run the eval. Emit three-layer report with CI.
Recalibrate the judge first; then run eval.
Build the golden set first. Trajectory eval without a frozen set is non-comparable.
Escalate — closed/no-log harness. Instrument the harness before adopting this methodology.

example.p: logs_available=true → golden_set_ready=true → judge_fresh_or_rule_based=true → conclusion: run-eval. Output the three-layer report.
